title: RACF Authorization Model
description: Understand how RACF enforces access control on datasets, programs, and resources.

steps.title: Dataset Profile
steps.screen:
LISTDSD DATASET('SYS1.PARMLIB') ALL

DATASET SYS1.PARMLIB
  OWNER: SYS1
  UACC: NONE
  AUDIT: SUCCESS(READ)

ACCESS LIST:
  USER    ACCESS
  ----    ------
  HERC01  READ
  IBMUSER UPDATE
steps.expected: Identify the access control list and understand UACC (Universal Access).
steps.hint: UACC=NONE means no default access. Only users in the ACCESS LIST have permissions.
steps.assessment: Q4: RACF enforces policy, not the application or menu system.

steps.title: User Profile
steps.screen:
LISTUSER HERC01

USER=HERC01
  DEFAULT-GROUP=SYS1
  OWNER=IBMUSER
  CREATED=2024.001
  ATTRIBUTES=NONE
  LAST-ACCESS=2024.035/14:22:31
steps.expected: Understand the user identity model and group membership.
steps.hint: DEFAULT-GROUP determines the identity context for new objects created by the user.
steps.assessment: Q1: Identity is bound at TSO logon and carried through all operations.

steps.title: Permission Check
steps.screen:
EDIT 'SYS1.PARMLIB(IEASYS00)'
ICH408I USER(HERC01) NOT AUTHORIZED TO EDIT 'SYS1.PARMLIB'

PERMISSION DENIED
steps.expected: Recognize a RACF authorization failure and trace it to profile rules.
steps.hint: HERC01 has READ but not UPDATE access. EDIT requires UPDATE permission.
steps.assessment: Q4: RACF evaluated the request and denied it based on the profile.

steps.title: Elevated Access
steps.screen:
PERMIT 'SYS1.PARMLIB' ID(HERC01) ACCESS(UPDATE)
ICH06011I RACLISTED PROFILES FOR DATASET WILL NOT REFLECT CHANGE UNTIL SETROPTS REFRESH

SETROPTS REFRESH RACLIST(DATASET)
ICH10003I SETROPTS COMMAND COMPLETE
steps.expected: Understand how access is granted and when changes take effect.
steps.hint: RACF caches profiles for performance. SETROPTS REFRESH updates the in-memory cache.
steps.assessment: Q4: Authorization changes require explicit refresh to take effect.
